title: crepis vesicaria subsp. vesicaria
intro: Crepis vesicaria subsp. vesicaria, also known as smooth-hawk's-beard or blistering hawk's-beard, is a biennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support immune function. Crepis vesicaria subsp. vesicaria can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine.
